name: Lia Memory Engine
description: Lia-style context engine for OpenClaw — structured compaction via Haiku, auto-flush transcripts, BM25 auto-retrieval, and memory_search tool.

enabled.description: Enable or disable the Lia Memory Engine

compactionThreshold.description: Fraction of context window that triggers compaction (0-1)

compactionModel.description: Model to use for compaction summarization

autoRetrieval.description: Automatically search memory files and inject relevant context on every turn

autoRetrievalTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for auto-retrieval search (keeps agent responsive)

transcriptRetentionDays.description: Number of days to retain daily transcript files

qmdPort.description: Port for the QMD HTTP daemon

qmdHost.description: Host for the QMD HTTP daemon

qmdCollectionName.description: QMD collection name for this agent's memory

enableVectorSearch.description: Enable vector semantic search (requires GGUF model download on first run)
